display_text: Fae Grenade, Tier 4: Neutral item that throws a shadow brand at an enemy unit up to 900 range. Deals 40 damage per second and provides vision of the debuffed unit for 7 seconds. Excellent for tracking enemy movement, securing kills on fleeing low-health targets, or scouting. Stats: CD: 20s, Mana: 25, DPS: 40, Duration: 7s, Range: 900.
